apply DirectSum.isInternal_of_iSupIndep
    exact I.sSupIndep'
  ¬∑ -- Show that the direct sum equals the top element
    have h1 : ‚®Ü p : I, p.val c = ‚ä§ := by
      have h2 : sSup (SetLike.coe I) = ‚ä§ := I.sSup_eq_top'
      have h3 : ‚®Ü p : I, p.val c = sSup (SetLike.coe I) := by
        simp [SetLike.coe]
        <;> try { tauto }
        <;> try { native_decide }
        <;> try { native_decide }
      rw [h3, h2]
    simpa using h1
